titleStmt.title: SII 34.297: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 297. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the old kitchen in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: The nāṭṭār of Valla-nāḍu sold a silver vessel of the temple to get a sum of 11,000 kāsu for clearing the tax arrears on a common land within the tank of the nāḍu. Instead they decided to use in future the tax revenue of the above land for celebrating a festival called Valla-nāḍantirunāḷ during the Tiruvādirai day in the month of Mārgaḻi. For that they made the land as taxfree tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cī vīrapāṇṭiya tEvarkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatā
vatu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉārkku vallanāṭṭu nāṭāy Icainta
nāṭṭōmum kalveṭṭik kuṭuttaparicāvatu nāṭṭuk kuḷattu Uḷvāyil perunaṟkiḷi
ccōḻa nāṭāḻvāṉ kuṭikkāṭṭukku Oṉpatāvatu varaiy kā
Accuvari kaṭamaiyāl vaṉta kācu patiṉōrāyirattukku vilaiyāka koṇṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār
cīpaṇṭārattilē taravēṇumeṉkaiyālē Ikkācukku nāyaṉār cātti varukiṟa veḷ
ḷitirukkoḷkai Iṭuvittu Ikkācu patiṉōrāyiramum kaikkoṇṭu Ikkuṭi
kkāṭṭāl vaṉta Accuvari kaṭamai Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Innāyaṉāṟkku tiru
mārkaḻi tiruvātaraikkumāka Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa vallanāṭaṉ tiruṉāḷukku tirunāḷ paṭiyā
raiyat tirunāḷukku Ikkuṭikkāṭu Iṟaiiliyāka tirunāmattu kāṇi
kuṭuttōm Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅkuḷamuṭaiya nāyanārkku valla nāṭṭu
nāṭē
Digital edition of SII 34.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
